goal: exists(k0: MonoidHom[M, M]) { MonoidHom.new[M, M](identity_fn[M]) = Option.some(k0) }

p.c: function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: T0 -> T1) { not MonoidHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: MonoidHom[T0, T1]) { MonoidHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[MonoidHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[M, M](identity_fn[M])
function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: T0 -> T1) { MonoidHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) = is_monoid_hom[T0, T1](x0) }[M, M](identity_fn[M])

not MonoidHom.constraint[M, M](identity_fn[M]) or is_monoid_hom[M, M](identity_fn[M])
function[T0: Monoid] { is_monoid_hom[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0]) }[M]
function[T0: Monoid] { Option.some[MonoidHom[T0, T0]](identity_monoid_hom[T0]) = MonoidHom.new[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0]) }[M]
identity_monoid_hom[M].hom != identity_fn[M]
exists(k0: M) { identity_fn(k0) != identity_monoid_hom[M].hom(k0) }
let w0: M satisfy { identity_fn(w0) != identity_monoid_hom[M].hom(w0) }

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[MonoidHom[T0, T1]](x0) != MonoidHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[M, M](identity_monoid_hom[M], identity_fn[M], w0)

goal: exists(k0: MonoidHom[M, P]) { MonoidHom.new[M, P](compose[M, N, P](f.hom, g.hom)) = Option.some(k0) }
